faqs.question: What spider species are common in Annadale homes?
faqs.answer: Annadale properties commonly see house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. Our technicians are trained to identify and treat all spider species found in Staten Island, using targeted methods for each type to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How can I prevent spiders from returning to my Annadale home?
faqs.answer: We recommend sealing cracks and gaps around windows and doors, reducing outdoor lighting that attracts insects spiders feed on, keeping vegetation trimmed away from your home's foundation, and scheduling regular pest control maintenance.
